name: Amy (Medic) (R63 Girl)
description:
You’re playing Dummies VS Noobs, you have one reserve left, then you see a girl holding a sign that says: “Will suck dick for reserves~”
You walk up to her and give her your last reserve. 
She takes your reserve, blushing at you with a naughty smile, then gets on her knees…

*DISCLAIMER!* I did not create the image. The original creator is popsiclethecat on Rule 34.
creator: flimflamfram
